summary: Recent Statistics graduate from the University of Toronto with hands-on internship experience in data analytics and business intelligence. Skilled in SQL, Python, and Tableau with demonstrated ability to build executive-level dashboards and perform data-driven analyses. Capstone research involved analyzing 2M+ retail transactions using statistical methods including regression and clustering. Experienced presenting analytical findings to non-technical audiences.

experience.title: Data Analytics Intern
bullets: Developed 4 Tableau dashboards to track customer acquisition KPIs for the retail banking division
Wrote SQL queries to extract and transform data from 3 source systems including Oracle and PostgreSQL
Conducted cohort analysis that identified a 15% drop-off in mobile banking activation, informing a UX redesign initiative
Delivered weekly analytics presentations to senior manager and marketing analytics team of 6

experience.title: Research Assistant
bullets: Performed analysis on 2M+ retail transaction records using Python (pandas, scikit-learn) for capstone research
Applied regression analysis and K-means clustering to uncover customer segmentation patterns
Designed data visualizations in matplotlib and Tableau to support thesis defense presentation

experience.company: Student Data Club — University of Toronto
experience.title: VP Analytics
bullets: Organized 12 workshops on SQL and Python fundamentals for 80+ undergraduate students
Led a team of 5 students in a campus-wide survey data analysis project
